title: Add constellation connection lines between points

tests.description: init() adds a THREE.LineSegments mesh to the scene
acceptanceCriteria: A connection-line layer can be composited over any point-based geometry system

tests.description: LineSegments mesh uses BufferGeometry with position attribute (itemSize 3)
acceptanceCriteria: A connection-line layer can be composited over any point-based geometry system

tests.description: only points within proximity threshold are connected (default threshold)
acceptanceCriteria: Lines connect points within a configurable proximity threshold

tests.description: configurable proximity threshold changes which points are connected
acceptanceCriteria: Lines connect points within a configurable proximity threshold

tests.description: bass energy modulates connection distance threshold via uniform
acceptanceCriteria: Connection distance threshold is modulated by bass energy (bass expands/contracts the web)

tests.description: line opacity fades with distance between connected points (distance attribute present)
acceptanceCriteria: Line opacity fades with distance between connected points

tests.description: closer connections have higher alpha factor than distant connections
acceptanceCriteria: Line opacity fades with distance between connected points

tests.description: connection count is bounded by maxConnections config
acceptanceCriteria: Connection count is bounded to avoid GPU overload

tests.description: default maxConnections prevents runaway line count with dense point clouds
acceptanceCriteria: Connection count is bounded to avoid GPU overload

tests.description: LineSegments uses ShaderMaterial with vertex and fragment shaders
acceptanceCriteria: Lines render as Three.js LineSegments with depth fog

tests.description: material uses transparent blending and depthWrite disabled for compositing over points
acceptanceCriteria: A connection-line layer can be composited over any point-based geometry system
Lines render as Three.js LineSegments with depth fog

tests.description: shader includes fog uniform for depth fog effect
acceptanceCriteria: Lines render as Three.js LineSegments with depth fog

tests.description: low tier config reduces maxConnections or disables constellation entirely
acceptanceCriteria: System degrades gracefully on low-tier devices (fewer connections or disabled)

tests.description: init with null positions does not throw (graceful skip for incompatible systems)
acceptanceCriteria: A connection-line layer can be composited over any point-based geometry system
System degrades gracefully on low-tier devices (fewer connections or disabled)

tests.description: init with empty positions array does not throw
acceptanceCriteria: System degrades gracefully on low-tier devices (fewer connections or disabled)

tests.description: init with fewer than 2 points produces no connections
acceptanceCriteria: System degrades gracefully on low-tier devices (fewer connections or disabled)

tests.description: draw() does not throw with valid FrameState
acceptanceCriteria: A connection-line layer can be composited over any point-based geometry system

tests.description: draw() updates uTime uniform from frame state
acceptanceCriteria: A connection-line layer can be composited over any point-based geometry system

tests.description: cleanup() removes LineSegments from scene and disposes geometry/material
acceptanceCriteria: A connection-line layer can be composited over any point-based geometry system

tests.description: setOpacity updates uOpacity uniform on line material
acceptanceCriteria: A connection-line layer can be composited over any point-based geometry system

tests.description: treble energy is passed through to shader uniform
acceptanceCriteria: A connection-line layer can be composited over any point-based geometry system

tests.description: palette hue uniform reflects visual params
acceptanceCriteria: A connection-line layer can be composited over any point-based geometry system

tests.description: same positions produce same connection topology (deterministic)
acceptanceCriteria: Lines connect points within a configurable proximity threshold

tests.description: draw does not throw with edge-case params (zero bass, zero treble, no pointer)
acceptanceCriteria: A connection-line layer can be composited over any point-based geometry system

tests.description: boundary values (proximityThreshold=0, maxConnections=0) do not throw
acceptanceCriteria: System degrades gracefully on low-tier devices (fewer connections or disabled)

tests.description: no localStorage or cookie access during init/draw operations
acceptanceCriteria: A connection-line layer can be composited over any point-based geometry system

tests.description: line positions exist in 3D space (not coplanar, Z values vary)
acceptanceCriteria: Lines render as Three.js LineSegments with depth fog

tests.description: constellation renders with additive blending for glow compositing
acceptanceCriteria: A connection-line layer can be composited over any point-based geometry system

tests.description: motion amplitude uniform is updated from visual params
acceptanceCriteria: A connection-line layer can be composited over any point-based geometry system

tests.description: proximity threshold uniform exists for bass-driven modulation in shader
acceptanceCriteria: Connection distance threshold is modulated by bass energy (bass expands/contracts the web)

helpers.defaultParams:
const defaultParams: VisualParams = {
  paletteHue: 180,
  paletteSaturation: 0.5,
  cadence: 0.7,
  density: 0.6,
  motionAmplitude: 1.0,
  pointerDisturbance: 0,
  bassEnergy: 0,
  trebleEnergy: 0,
  curveSoftness: 0.5,
  structureComplexity: 0.5,
  noiseFrequency: 1.0,
  radialScale: 1.0,
  twistStrength: 1.0,
  fieldSpread: 1.0,
};

imports: import { describe, it, expect, vi } from 'vitest';

exports.name: createConstellationLines
exports.description: Factory function that creates a constellation line overlay system

exports.name: getActiveVertexCount
exports.description: Returns the number of active vertices in the line buffer (for testing connection counts)

ConstellationLines.init: (scene: Scene, positions: Float32Array, params: VisualParams) => void
